decisions.summary: The workspace had no PAN-1030 beads on recovery, so I created a single issue-scoped bead for the full awaiting-input indicator feature and kept the implementation in one reviewable commit.

Awaiting-input state is derived observationally from existing runtime waiting signals, pending AskUserQuestion JSONL records, and read-only tmux pane scans for permission menus, y/n confirmations, and planning-finalized Done prompts. No agent state is mutated by detection.

The existing pipeline-status skill was already tracked on this branch but missing from the synced-skills fixture, so the fixture was updated to keep the full test suite green without changing skill contents.

Review feedback requires planning-only awaiting-input badges to open the Issue Inspector, not the Plan dialog, because the inspector owns the exact prompt text and one-click terminal attach affordance.
Stopped agents with runtime resolution needs_input must carry a fallback prompt and reason so the stricter frontend pending-question helper still surfaces the blocked state.

hazards.summary: The recovered workspace started without issue-scoped beads and with a stale tracked continue-file deletion from another issue.
hazards.mitigation: Created bead workspace-mla7 and replaced the stale continue state with PAN-1030-specific recovery notes.

hazards.summary: Full npm test initially failed on a pre-existing synced-skills fixture mismatch and a project-route unit test mock that did not include the newly-used tmux capture helper.
hazards.mitigation: Updated the committed fixture to include the tracked pipeline-status skill and extended the route test tmux mock with capturePaneAsync.

hazards.summary: Merging origin/main conflicted only in the workspace-local continue.json, where main carried unrelated PAN-1025 state.
hazards.mitigation: Kept the PAN-1030 continue state because this workspace is issue-scoped to PAN-1030.

hazards.summary: Review reruns can leave local and remote merge commits divergent when a remote ref is repaired through the GitHub API.
hazards.mitigation: Merged origin/feature/pan-1030 back into the local branch before pushing the review-fix commit, restoring fast-forward push behavior.

resumePoint.description: Stopped needs_input prompt feedback fixed locally. Next: commit/push continue state, rerun pan review request PAN-1030 -m "Fixed verification error", and monitor the review pipeline.

sessionHistory.note: Recovered PAN-1030 with no matching beads. Created workspace-mla7, claimed it, and implemented read-only prompt detection plus kanban, command deck, and inspector indicators.

Verified implementation with npm run build, npm run typecheck, npm run lint, targeted detector/pipeline tests, and full npm test (4525 passed, 48 skipped). Fixed the route mock and synced-skills fixture failures found during full test.

Addressed review feedback by routing planning-only input badges to the inspector, adding regression coverage, bounding pane-detection cache growth, verifying typecheck/lint/full tests, and pushing the reconciled branch.

Addressed security review feedback by adding fallback prompt and reason fields to stopped agents whose runtime resolution is needs_input. Verified with typecheck, lint, targeted tests, and full npm test.
